comparison.callFor: Work, daily life, and official procedures
comparison.caption: Feature comparison of CALL SIM and DATA SIM
comparison.title: CALL SIM vs. DATA SIM
cta.externalNote: You will be redirected to our partner's application page.
device.body: Use a SIM-free device, a SIM-unlocked device, or a device compatible with the DOCOMO network. If you choose eSIM, also confirm that your device supports eSIM.
device.title: Compatible devices and eSIM
faq.1.a: Yes. Prepare the required identity documents and apply online.
faq.10.a: The service states that orders may ship the same day when payment and screening are completed by 2:00 p.m. Delivery varies by area, stock, and screening status.
faq.10.q: When will my SIM card arrive?
faq.11.a: Check the SIM-lock status, DOCOMO network frequency support, and eSIM compatibility with the manufacturer or retailer.
faq.11.q: How do I check device compatibility?
faq.2.a: Yes. You can apply from overseas and pick up your service at an airport after arriving in Japan. Procedures vary by plan and pickup method.
faq.2.q: Can I apply from outside Japan?
faq.3.a: For a CALL SIM application from Japan, you generally need a residence card; from overseas, you need a passport. For DATA SIM, you can use a passport or residence card.
faq.3.q: Which identity documents do I need?
faq.4.a: Yes. Within Japan, you can choose convenience-store payment, bank transfer, and other methods. A credit card may be required for initial fees when applying from overseas.
faq.4.q: Can I apply without a credit card?
faq.5.a: Yes. Confirm your device’s eSIM compatibility and the identity-verification and pickup requirements for your plan.
faq.6.a: CALL SIM includes a Japanese phone number. DATA SIM does not provide a number for voice calls.
faq.6.q: Will I get a Japanese phone number?
faq.7.a: CALL SIM supports mobile number portability (MNP). Check the application page because required information and deadlines apply.
faq.7.q: Can I keep my current phone number?
faq.8.a: Your speed is limited to a maximum of 128kbps. Eligible plans can add 1GB for ¥880.
faq.8.q: What happens when I use all my data?
faq.9.a: There is no minimum term. The official site currently advertises a campaign waiving the cancellation administration fee. Confirm at application whether this is a permanent condition.
faq.9.q: Is there a minimum term or cancellation fee?
feature.5g.body: On a compatible device, you can switch to 5G after activation at no extra charge.
feature.5g.title: 5G ready
feature.delivery.body: Physical SIM cards are delivered free of charge within Japan.
feature.delivery.title: Free nationwide delivery
feature.overseas.body: Apply before you arrive so you can aim to get connected soon after landing.
feature.overseas.title: Apply from overseas
feature.payment.body: Pay at convenience stores, by credit card, bank transfer, and more.

feature.phone.body: With CALL SIM, you get a Japanese phone number for work and everyday life.
feature.phone.title: Japanese phone number
feature.support.body: Support is primarily available in Japanese, English, Chinese, and Vietnamese.
feature.support.title: Multilingual support
final.body: Choose the plan that suits you and apply online.
final.title: Start life in Japan with a reliable connection.

hero.lead: Not confident in Japanese or don't have a credit card? SUMOU sim helps you get connected for everyday life in Japan.
identity.data.body: Upload an image of your passport or residence card during the application.
identity.domestic.body: After applying online, you may need to verify your identity at a Seven Bank ATM using your residence card, or complete identity verification at delivery. Follow the instructions for the application method you selected.
identity.domestic.title: CALL SIM application from Japan
identity.overseas.body: Apply using your passport, then receive the physical SIM or eSIM activation information at Haneda or Narita Airport.
identity.overseas.title: CALL SIM application from overseas
identity.title: Check how identity verification works.

meta.description: SUMOU sim is a SIM service for international residents in Japan, with plans from ¥880/month, convenience-store payments, multilingual support, free delivery across Japan, and applications before arrival.
meta.title: SUMOU sim | An easier way to stay connected in Japan.
network.lead: Key network conditions and additional charges to know before you start.
network.referenceMaxSpeed: LTE best effort: up to 375Mbps download
network.title: Network, speed, calls, and SMS
note.device: Before use, confirm the device’s supported frequencies, SIM-lock status, and eSIM compatibility.
note.identity: Identity verification varies by application category and delivery method. Follow the latest instructions shown on the application page.
note.maxPlan: SUMOU MAX is not eligible for data rollover or additional data purchases.
note.pricing: Prices include tax. A one-time contract administration fee of ¥3,300 is charged initially. Calls, outgoing SMS, extra data, and other services cost extra. Prices and promotions may change; check the application page for the latest terms.
note.publication: Prices and conditions may change. Check the application page for the latest information.
note.speed: The stated speed is the technical maximum. Actual speeds vary by location, time, device, network congestion, and other factors.
overseas.body: Apply from overseas and receive your physical SIM or eSIM instructions at the airport after arriving in Japan. Depending on the conditions, DATA eSIM instructions may be completed entirely online.
overseas.note: Because CALL eSIM requires legally mandated identity verification, the process may not be completed by email alone; document pickup at an airport or another location may be required.
payment.codNote: Initial fees for CALL SIM applications made within Japan only
payment.note: Billing dates and cancellation deadlines vary by payment method. Check the application page and terms of service for details.
payment.title:

a credit card.
